历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 336 → 313 → 245 → 228 → 267, showing an overall forward trend (cumulative forward movement of 108 places from 2021 to 2024), but in 2025, there was a slight rebound with a backward movement of 39 places compared to 2024; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 267. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 16 → 18 → 17 → 16 → 12, with a reduction of 4 in 2025 compared to 2024; the 2026 plan is 10, a further reduction of 2 from 2025 (a decrease of about 16.7%), indicating a clear trend of enrollment contraction and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 4th in the main list of the Soft Science China University Rankings (stable from 2021 to 2026), belonging to the top tier of national universities; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving school management and academic misconduct incidents (high number of retractions), but these are not core factors for application; Douyin popularity ranking is 42nd (relatively popular), with moderate short video exposure; in 2021, there was an abnormal signal of Henan science admission line being the lowest among the C9 League, but no significant gaps since then; it has 28 A- or above disciplines, including Computer Science and Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Biology, Clinical Medicine, Business Administration, and Management Science and Engineering as A+ disciplines, with extremely strong academic strength, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Artificial Intelligence, and other majors continue to be highly recommended, closely matching SJTU's advantageous disciplines; Hebei Physics Category candidates in 2025 are about 363,000, and in 2026, total candidates are about 610,000 (estimated at about 366,000 for Physics Category based on recent proportion of about 60%), with candidate numbers roughly stable; the provincial control line for Physics Category has risen from 412 in 2021 to 459 in 2025, reflecting continuously increasing competition intensity; Shanghai Jiao Tong University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal; its enrollment proportion in Hebei Province is about 2.3%–3.0% (2021–2025), not a local university, with no local preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the forward trend of historical rankings from 2021 to 2024, the slight backward rebound in 2025, the continued enrollment contraction in 2026 (intensified competition), the rising provincial control line, and stable candidate numbers, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will further advance from the 2025 baseline of 267; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 240, with a range of 190–290.

- Artificial Intelligence (Top Talent Pilot Class)
- Electronic Information (IEEE Pilot Class, including Dual Bachelor's Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)

- Robotics Engineering (Autonomous Intelligent Leading Class)
- Embodied Intelligence (Top Talent Pilot Class).

- No other low-score majors currently (Physics Category in 2026 has only 6 enrollment majors, all popular directions, with small ranking differences).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: All enrollment majors for Shanghai Jiao Tong University Physics Category in 2026 are top popular directions, with minimal ranking differences between majors. The predicted ranking is around 240. Candidates with rankings within 190 are advised to aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Yongqiang Pilot Class, AI Top Talent Class); candidates with rankings between 190–240 should focus on Tier 2 majors; candidates with rankings between 240–290 can attempt to apply but should be prepared for major adjustment.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 minimum rankings for History Category: 61→53→56→74→167; stable in 53–61 range from 2021–2023, moved to 74 in 2024, significantly dropped to 167 in 2025 (93 places lower than 2024); baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 167; enrollment plans for 2021–2025: 1→1→1→2→6 students; 2025 expanded by 4 students compared to 2024; 2026 plan is 10 students, further expanding by 4 students compared to 2025 (increase of about 66.7%), significant expansion, competition notably dispersed.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; ranked 4th in Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking (stable 2021–2026), top-tier national university; 2026 reputation evaluation slightly negative, mainly involving school management and academic misconduct incidents, but not core factors for application; Douyin popularity ranking 42 (relatively hot); no significant admission gaps; Law A-level, Journalism and Communication A-level, Foreign Languages and Literature A+, highly matching History Category majors (Law Experimental Class, Humanities Experimental Class), strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major popularity is recommended (relatively hot); Journalism and Communication significantly discouraged (heavily influenced by Zhang Xuefeng's remarks); Hebei History Category candidates approximately 244,000 in 2025, total candidates in 2026 about 610,000 (estimated about 244,000 based on recent History Category proportion of about 40%), candidate scale roughly stable; History Category provincial control line fluctuates significantly (2021 454→2023 430→2025 477); Shanghai Jiao Tong University located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, strong regional appeal; enrollment proportion in Hebei Province about 2.3%–3.0%, not a local university, no local preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant drop of 93 places in 2025 ranking, continued substantial expansion in 2026 (+66.7%), stable candidate scale, etc., it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will continue to drop from the 2025 baseline of 167; predicted minimum ranking approximately 234, range 184–284.

- Law Experimental Class (including dual degree programs).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
